---
name: 🌏 New region / country
about: Request or propose support for a new region's tax/pension rules
title: '[Region] '
labels: new-region
assignees: ''
---

## Country / Region
E.g. Mainland China, United States (Federal), Singapore, United Kingdom, ...

## Is there an official government reference?
Link to the tax authority's page describing the current year's rules.

## Tax calculation summary
- Filing unit: individual / household
- Pay cycle: monthly / yearly / weekly
- Type: progressive brackets / flat rate / other
- Deductions / allowances: [list]

## Pension / social security summary
- Name: [e.g. 401(k), CPF, 五险一金]
- Employee contribution: [% or formula]
- Employer contribution: [% or formula]
- Cap: [annual / monthly]
- Tax-deductible: yes/no

## Public holidays
Link to your country's official holiday list for the current year.

## Are you willing to implement this?
- [ ] Yes, I'll submit a PR
- [ ] No, I'm just requesting
